en.title: Highlight the article
en.prompt: Carefully read the following text and highlight the key points using double asterisks (**) around the words or phrases you want to emphasize. Do not alter the original text or summarize it. Here is the text: [text to rewrite]
en.remark: Highlight augments the legibility of a written composition. Nonetheless, ChatGPT defaults to exhibit Markdown syntax, obliging one to manually select the highlighted segment after the output has been generated.

metaDescription: Skimming text? Highlight key points with double asterisks. Enhance readability without altering the original content. Try it now.

faq.q: The highlighting is Markdown syntax, will it show asterisks when pasted?
faq.a: Yes. Rendering requires Markdown-supporting destinations (GitHub, Notion, Feishu, Typora). In Word or plain email you see raw ** characters, so you'll need to manually bold or use Word's "Paste as HTML" to convert.

faq.q: Too much highlighting makes key points disappear, what do I do?
faq.a: Append "total highlighted content must not exceed 10 percent, only mark the most important information." Without a limit the AI tends to bold every noun, defeating the purpose. Specifying a ratio is the key to forcing subtraction.
